containerStyle: background-color: #212529 !important; border: 1px solid #343a40; border-radius: 4px; padding: 8px 0; box-shadow: 0 0.5rem 1rem rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
itemStyle: display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 10px 20px; color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.75) !important; text-decoration: none; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; transition: color 0.15s ease-in-out;

items.label: Statystyki TCM
